summary.reduction_note: Reduced from 40964 to 2240 records. Cyclic entries are the structurally simplest (fewest rings, smallest ring-atom count) representative per family, weighted by FDA drug frequency. Sources: [1] Vitaku E et al., J Med Chem 2014, 57(24):10257-74, https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/jm501100b; [2] FDA update 2013-2023, J Med Chem 2024, https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acs.jmedchem.4c01122; [3] Taylor RD et al., J Med Chem 2014, 57(14):5845-59, https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/jm4017625
summary.phase2_1_registry_notes: Phase 2.1 made registry identifiers unique for duplicate functional-group patterns (quinoneimine and sulfoxide variants). Original duplicate aliases are preserved.
summary.phase2_1_validation_status: metadata validation passes with unique pattern_id values; SMARTS validation available via CLI.
